title: Deploy and configure Windows Server IaaS Virtual Machine
summary: In this learning path, you’ll learn how to deploy and configure Azure IaaS Virtual Machine workloads. After completing the learning path, you’ll know how to plan, deploy, and upgrade Windows Server Azure Virtual Machines.

sections.title: Deploy and configure Windows Server IaaS Virtual Machine
sections.summary: In this learning path, you’ll learn how to deploy and configure Azure IaaS Virtual Machine workloads. After completing the learning path, you’ll know how to plan, deploy, and upgrade Windows Server Azure Virtual Machines.

lessons.title: Plan and deploy Windows Server IaaS Virtual Machines
lessons.content_md:
You're able to describe Azure compute and storage in relation to Azure VMs, and deploy Azure VMs by using the Azure portal, Azure CLI, or templates.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/plan-deploy-windows-server-iaas-virtual-machines/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Plan and deploy Windows Server IaaS Virtual Machines

lessons.title: Customize Windows Server IaaS Virtual Machine images
lessons.content_md:
Learn to create new VMs from generalized images and use Azure Image Builder templates to create and manage images in Azure.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/customize-windows-server-iaas-virtual-machine-images/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Customize Windows Server IaaS Virtual Machine images

lessons.title: Automate the configuration of Windows Server IaaS Virtual Machines
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to deploy Desired State Configuration (DSC) extensions, implement those extensions to remediate noncompliant servers, and use custom script extension.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/automate-configuration-of-windows-server-iaas-virtual-machines/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Automate the configuration of Windows Server IaaS Virtual Machines

lessons.title: Upgrade and migrate Windows Server IaaS virtual machines
lessons.content_md:
Learn to migrate a workload running in Windows Server to an infrastructure as a service (IaaS) virtual machine (VM) and to Windows Server 2025 by using Windows Server migration tools or the Storage Migration Service.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/upgrade-migrate-windows-server-iaas-virtual-machines/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Upgrade and migrate Windows Server IaaS virtual machines

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Deploy and configure Windows Server IaaS Virtual Machine
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Deploy and configure Windows Server IaaS Virtual Machine**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
